name: Resource Gap Analysis Engine
description: Automated resource gap analysis with hiring, deployment, and upskill recommendations. Ingests headcount/skills data and project demand forecasts to produce actionable workforce decisions.

hireVsContractThresholdMonths.description: Demand duration (months) below which contractor engagement is recommended over FTE hire (FR-3.3).

secondaryGapRiskThreshold.description: Minimum source-team coverage below which a redeployment is flagged as a secondary gap risk (FR-4.4, AC-5).

fullCoverageProficiencyRatio.description: Proficiency ratio threshold for full supply coverage when no explicit weighting entry matches (FR-2.2).

criticalGapThreshold.description: Uncovered demand ratio above which a gap is classified as Critical (FR-2.4).

moderateGapThreshold.description: Uncovered demand ratio above which a gap is classified as Moderate (FR-2.4).

compoundingProjectThreshold.description: Minimum number of concurrent projects sharing the same skill deficit to be flagged as compounding (FR-2.5).
